title: Main Menu Revamp
description: I want a diagetic main menu that tells the story of the player arriving at the island. In the fram should be the mast of a ship, rigging and the captains quarters, with lights coming from the window panes and a lantern next to the door. The ship should be swaying with the wind, with the lantern also swaying. The player should hear sea shanties and drunken men singing in the hull of the ship. every once and a while a bird should be seen flying in the skybox portion of the frame in the top left of the screen, rats shouldoccasionally run by the camera.
definition-of-done: Scene is rendered in blender and the animation can play in the game engine.
todos: Render the scene in blender
Animate the scene blender
Make a ship model in blender
Make a captain's quarters model in blender
Make a rigging model in blender
Make a lantern model in blender and rig it
Make a rat model in blender and rig it
Make a bird model in blender and rig it
Get a list of sea shanties that are public domain
Record wind sound effects
Record bird sound effects
Record rat sound effects
Record drunken man sound effects
Record sea shanty sound effects
Figure out how to load meshes in the game engine
Figure out how to animate the scene in the game engine
Create a ticket for clouds in the skybox
Add the scene to the main menu
Add the audio to the scene
Add a fade in and out to the scene
Add a loading icon to the transition to the game
unknowns: How to load meshes in the game engine
How to animate the scene in the game engine
How to add the scene to the main menu
How to add the audio to the scene
